title: ASEP Project Manifest
description: The canonical, manifest-driven description of a project managed by ASEP. This is the single source of truth from which documentation, governance, and generated artifacts are derived. It contains no business logic and no secrets.

name.description: Human-readable project name in the canonical language (English).

description.description: Short project description in the canonical language.

canonicalLanguage.description: Semantic source language. MUST be 'en' (ADR 0001); enforced, not merely documented.

locales.description: Locales for which localized artifacts are generated. Localization never affects logic.

profiles.description: Profiles applied to this project, in precedence order (later overrides earlier).

repository.description: Non-secret repository coordinates. Credentials are never stored here.

controls.description: Governance/security controls in scope, referenced by stable ID.

metadata.description: Open, non-authoritative annotations. MUST NOT be used for program logic.
